modules.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachUtils
documentation: Manage detached processes
File:    DetachUtils.py
Date:    06-Mar-2013
Updates:
07-Mar-2013  jdw Define method setLogHandle() to implement log redirection.  This method must
must exist on the input object.

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachUtils.DetachUtils

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachUtils.DetachUtils.runDetach
documentation: Run the worker function as a detached process --

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachUtils.DetachUtils.__postSemaphore
documentation: This should be invoked in __del__ likely
def __closeSemaphoreLog(self, semaphore="TMP_"):  # pylint: disable=unused-argument
self.__cLog.flush()
self.__cLog.close()

Derived dictionary class supporting automatic initialization.

This will support pickle serialization/deserialization.

modules.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase
documentation: File: DetachedProcessBase.py
Date: 10-Feb-2015  J. Westbrook --
Update: 4-Mar-2016 jdw add explicit adjustments to the umask - if it appears that
unset -- (e.g. default assignment 022).

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase.__detachPrep
documentation: Internal method to prepare the execution environment for the detached process.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase._deletePidFile
documentation: Method to remove the sentinnel file containing the process id.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase.__getPidFromFile
documentation: Internal method to read process id file and return the process id.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase.__isRunning
documentation:
Internal method to read the current process id and check if the process
is active.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase.__setOwnerGroup
documentation:
Internal method to set the owner UID and GID of this process.  Requires a special privileges
to change the uid/gid.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase.start
documentation: Start the application as detached process -

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase.stop
documentation:
Stop the detached process and remove the process id file -

Kill current process and any descend/child processes.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase.restart
documentation: Restart the application as a detached process --

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase.status
documentation: Report the current status of the detached process and any process descendents.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase.run
documentation:
This is the entry point for the detached process.  Subclass this method and use the
start(), stop(), restart() and status() methods to manage the process.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.DetachedProcessBase.DetachedProcessBase.suspend
documentation:
This is an optional entry point to gracefully suspend the detached process before stopping/killing.
Subclass this method in the worker class. This method will be called prior to the stop() method.

Base class for managing a detached process.

Subclass the base class run() method as desired.

modules.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.SubProcessUtil
documentation: File: SubProcessUtil.py
Date: 10-Feb-2015  J. Westbrook

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.detach.SubProcessUtil.SubProcessUtil
documentation:
Skeleton methods supporting running shell and python scripts as subprocesses.

These methods are provided primarily to support testing other classes.
import datetime
import signal
import stat
import time
